ddls:
CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the measurement */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute of the measurement */,
  "second" REAL /* Second of the measurement */,
  "irms" REAL /* Root mean square current */,
  "vrms" REAL /* Root mean square voltage */,
  "prms" REAL /* Root mean square power */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for the measurement */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device that took the measurement */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the electrical signal */,
  "phase_angle" REAL /* Phase angle between voltage and current */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Ambient temperature during the measurement */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Ambient humidity during the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the device */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the device was installed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the device */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high consumption, low voltage) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes on how the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy profile */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device associated with the profile */,
  "profile_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy profile */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the profile period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for the profile period */,
  "profile_type" TEXT /* Type of energy profile */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy profile */,
  "thresholds" TEXT /* Thresholds for the energy profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_profiles_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report summarizing findings */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  "file_location" TEXT /* Location of the report file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for the next maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device measured */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the historical period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the historical period */,
  "average_irms" REAL /* Average Irms for the period */,
  "average_vrms" REAL /* Average Vrms for the period */,
  "average_prms" REAL /* Average Prms for the period */,
  "total_irms" REAL /* Total Irms for the period */,
  "total_vrms" REAL /* Total Vrms for the period */,
  "total_prms" REAL /* Total Prms for the period */,
  "min_irms" REAL /* Minimum Irms for the period */,
  "min_vrms" REAL /* Minimum Vrms for the period */,
  "min_prms" REAL /* Minimum Prms for the period */,
  "max_irms" REAL /* Maximum Irms for the period */,
  "max_vrms" REAL /* Maximum Vrms for the period */,
  "max_prms" REAL /* Maximum Prms for the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "notification_content" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "sent_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is the default role for new users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
